description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8 Docker image with a cache on node_modules/ and a before_script that runs npm install. Define a single stage called test. Add a job named test:node:8 that runs only on the master branch, uses the default node:8 image, and executes npm install then npm test. Add another job named test:node:latest that also runs only on master, overrides the image to node:latest, and runs npm install followed by npm test, both belonging to the test stage.
